name: FAW Jiefang Group Co., Ltd
summary: FAW Jiefang Group Co., Ltd develops, manufactures, and sells passenger cars and accessories. The company was formerly known as Faw Car Co., Ltd. and changed its name to FAW Jiefang Group Co., Ltd in May 2020. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Changchun, China. FAW Jiefang Group Co., Ltd is a subsidiary of China First Automobile Co., Ltd.
